title: antidesma platyphyllum
intro: Antidesma platyphyllum, also known as the Malaysian breadfruit, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The leaves and roots of the plant are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
